---
title: "Class website future"
date: "2026-12-05T12:57"
categories: [course details]
---

Hello everyone!

A few of you have wondered about what's going to happen to the course website. It will stay up indefinitely. The whole reason I put all the course materials on a standalone website rather than on iCollege is so that you can reference the materials in the future.

Bookmark the course site at <https://sneupane2.github.io/dataviz-pmap-8551/>. The source materials are also available in the [course GitHub repository](https://github.com/sneupane2/dataviz-pmap-8551).

The only things that aren't there are the answer keys and since I don't want the answer keys publicly accessible. So make sure you download those from iCollege before you lose access to the course there.
